posts.author: brateris (Dan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Add an if statement in automations with a continuation along the main branch.

What are you trying to achieve

Would like to be able to be able to duplicate this pseudo code:

In from branch above
if (condition == something) → Do this
else → Do this
then: continue on main branch

Currently the if blocks do this:
In from branch above
if (condition == something) → Do this and continue on a new branch
else → Do this and continue on a different branch
